# uci module
> Defines the default UCI configuration schema for the OpenWrt qos-scripts traffic-shaping system.
> **Total Context:** ~420 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [uci-skeleton.md](./uci-skeleton.md): Structural map for uci that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~210 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [uci-complete-reference.md](./uci-complete-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for uci when a larger context window is available. (~497 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Source Documents

- [uci_schema-schema-network-qos.md](../L2-semantic/uci/uci_schema-schema-network-qos.md): Defines the default UCI configuration schema for the OpenWrt qos-scripts traffic-shaping system. (~420 tokens, l2-source)
